name: Carmine Moretti || Exile
description:
I left myself behind never knowing what I wanted

Moretti Family - The one who turned his back on the family

Day 12: On the twelfth day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me, the jaded chef Moretti

When his brother Gian Carlo died--- he chose to leave everything he knew behind.

After all, if someone as good and brave as Gian Carlo could die---

Well there really as no hope for the rest of him.

He just wants to live a quiet life, fishing, cooking, and drinking.

Got it?

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

Remember how I said if you lurked about my discord server or read my bot builds you'd find some hints of Moretti's to come. Well surprise!

Meet Carmine-- he's Luciano's youngest brother and he wants nothing to do with mob life.

Once again, your backstory is left open aside from you seeking a job at the restaurant.

Want more Mafia content?

Italian Mafia - Moretti Family:

Click here to see the whole Moretti family and their Alts!

Please note! Only bots written by me-- m00nprincess, are a part of my Moretti series.
